face_landmarks.schema: per landmark: normalized x, y, z

face_blendshapes.notes: Default Face Landmarker graph output; current graph also notes 53 only if EXTRA_FACE_BLENDSHAPES is provided

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: jawOpen
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: How far the mandible drops vertically.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthClose
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Lip closure activation; high when lips seal.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthFunnel
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Forward funneling of the lips; useful for rounded vowels and sh/ch-like constrictions.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthPucker
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Lip protrusion/puckering; strongest cue for /u/-like visemes.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthStretch
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Horizontal spreading of the mouth corners.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthPress
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Lip pressing/compression; useful as a weak FF/PP support cue.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: mouthAreaNorm
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Inner-lip polygon area divided by inter-ocular-distance squared.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: lipSealScore
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: 1 means nearly sealed lips, 0 means clearly open.

canonical_frame_features_v1.name: roundnessScore
canonical_frame_features_v1.description: Composite rounding cue from mouthPucker + mouthFunnel + width constriction.
